profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your display name and Egyptian mobile number.
profile.phoneHint: Use local Egyptian format, for example 01012345678.
profile.saveError: Could not update your profile. Please try again.
profile.nameLength: Enter a name between 2 and 120 characters.
profile.phoneInvalidFormat: Enter an 11-digit Egyptian mobile number starting with 010, 011, 012, or 015.
profile.noPhone: Add a phone number to enable WhatsApp verification and checkout.
profile.savePhoneBeforeVerify: Save your phone number first to verify it.

phone.verifyPageSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your WhatsApp number.
phone.otpPrompt: We'll send the verification code to {{phone}}.
phone.sending: We're sending your verification code on WhatsApp...
phone.enterWhenArrives: Enter the 6-digit code once it arrives.
phone.mayTakeSeconds: This may take a few seconds.
phone.sendFailed: Could not send the code. Please try again.
phone.cooldown: You can request another code in {{seconds}} seconds.
phone.locked: Too many incorrect attempts. Please try again later.
phone.expired: This code expired or was already used. Request a new code.
phone.whatsappUnavailable: Phone verification through WhatsApp is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
phone.errorUnknown: Could not verify your phone. Please try again.

checkout.noPhoneOnFile: Please add a phone number to your account before completing checkout.
checkout.phoneVerificationRequired: Verify your account phone to complete this order.
checkout.whatsappUnavailable: Phone verification through WhatsApp is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.

security.title: Security
security.passwordTooWeak: Password does not meet the security requirements.
security.errorIncorrectPassword: The current password you entered is incorrect.
security.errorUnknown: Something went wrong while changing your password. Please try again.
